title: Undead Leather
description: Just another rotten flesh to leather mod.
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1212205?style=flat-square&logo=CurseForge&logoColor=f16436&label=CurseForge&labelColor=1a1a1a&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/undead-leather) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/P0Iv9AVc?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&label=Modrinth&labelColor=16181c&color=1bd96a)](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-leather)

[![Compatible with Sinytra Connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sinytra/.github/main/badges/connector/cozy.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-leather/gallery) [![kofi-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kckarnige) [![buymeacoffee-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/buymeacoffee-singular_64h.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)

Just a simple rotten flesh to leather mod, nothing more to it.

You can craft rotten flesh into rotten leather, then either smelt it, smoke it, or cook it on a campfire to turn it into leather.

If you're looking for Forge support, this mod is perfectly compatible with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector).

# Q&A 

### Q: Can I use this in my modpack?
A: Of course! This mod was meant for modpacks!

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?
A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: How can I support what you do?
A: If you like what I do, you can donate to my [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/kckarnige), my CashApp, or [buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)!
